title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 — Practice Set 1: Shapes & Patterns
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: How many triangles are shown in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 240 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="20,100 60,30 100,100" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="110,100 150,30 190,100" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="200,100 220,60 235,100" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Three triangles drawn side by side.
questions.solution: Count each separate triangle: there are three distinct triangles.

questions.question_text: Anna has 4 apples. Her brother gives her 3 more apples. How many apples does Anna have now?
questions.solution: Add 4 + 3 = 7 apples.

questions.question_text: Which shape is a square?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="25" cy="40" r="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="20" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">A</text><rect x="65" y="25" width="40" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="80" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">B</text><rect x="125" y="20" width="40" height="40" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="140" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">C</text><polygon points="190,60 210,20 230,60" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="205" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">D</text><ellipse cx="250" cy="40" rx="8" ry="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Five shapes labeled A-E: circle, rectangle, square, triangle, ellipse.
questions.solution: A square has four equal sides. Shape C is the only one with all equal sides.

questions.question_text: What comes next in the pattern? circle, square, circle, square, circle, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="20" cy="25" r="15" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="50" y="10" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="25" r="15" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="130" y="10" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="180" cy="25" r="15" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="220" y="32" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="currentColor">?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating pattern of circles and squares ending with a circle and question mark.
questions.solution: The pattern alternates circle and square. After a circle, a square comes next.

questions.question_text: What time does the clock show?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="60" cy="60" r="50" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="55" y="20" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">12</text><text x="100" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">3</text><text x="55" y="108" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">6</text><text x="12" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">9</text><line x1="60" y1="60" x2="60" y2="30" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="60" y1="60" x2="85" y2="60" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: An analog clock with the hour hand pointing to 3 and the minute hand pointing to 12.
questions.solution: Hour hand on 3 and minute hand on 12 means 3:00.

questions.question_text: How many stars are in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 240 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="20,10 24,22 36,22 26,30 30,42 20,34 10,42 14,30 4,22 16,22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="60,10 64,22 76,22 66,30 70,42 60,34 50,42 54,30 44,22 56,22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="100,10 104,22 116,22 106,30 110,42 100,34 90,42 94,30 84,22 96,22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="140,10 144,22 156,22 146,30 150,42 140,34 130,42 134,30 124,22 136,22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="180,10 184,22 196,22 186,30 190,42 180,34 170,42 174,30 164,22 176,22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/></svg>
questions.solution: Count each star: there are five stars.

questions.question_text: Tom had 10 candies. He ate 4. How many candies are left?
questions.solution: 10 - 4 = 6 candies remain.

questions.question_text: How many circles are in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 240 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="25" cy="40" r="15" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="70" cy="40" r="15" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="100" y="25" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="155" cy="40" r="15" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="40" r="15" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Four circles and one square in a row.
questions.solution: There are four circles and one square; count only circles: 4.

questions.question_text: How many small squares make up this big shape?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="10" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="40" y="10" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="70" y="10" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="10" y="40" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="40" y="40" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="70" y="40" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="10" y="70" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="40" y="70" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="70" y="70" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: A 3x3 grid of small squares forming a large square.
questions.solution: The grid has 3 rows and 3 columns, so 3 x 3 = 9 small squares.

questions.question_text: What shape completes the pattern? triangle, circle, square, triangle, circle, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 300 50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="10,40 25,10 40,40" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="65" cy="25" r="13" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="90" y="12" width="26" height="26" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="135,40 150,10 165,40" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="190" cy="25" r="13" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="225" y="32" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="currentColor">?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Repeating pattern triangle-circle-square shown twice but missing the last square.
questions.solution: The pattern repeats every three shapes: triangle, circle, square. The missing shape is a square.

questions.question_text: A week has 7 days. How many days are in 3 weeks?
questions.solution: 3 x 7 = 21 days in three weeks.

questions.question_text: Which figure has a line of symmetry?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="10,60 20,20 45,60" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="22" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">A</text><polygon points="60,60 70,30 80,50 95,60" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="75" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">B</text><path d="M 120 55 L 130 25 L 140 45 L 150 30 L 160 55 Z" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="135" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">C</text><polygon points="180,55 187,30 192,50 198,40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="185" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">D</text><circle cx="230" cy="45" r="18" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="225" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">E</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five shapes labeled A-E; only shape E (circle) is perfectly symmetric.
questions.solution: A circle has infinitely many lines of symmetry; the irregular shapes do not.

questions.question_text: How many dots are in the picture altogether?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="20" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="80" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="110" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="20" cy="50" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="80" cy="50" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="110" cy="50" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Two rows of four dots each.
questions.solution: Two rows of 4 dots give 2 x 4 = 8 dots.

questions.question_text: Mia is taller than Leo. Leo is taller than Sam. Who is the shortest?
questions.solution: Order from tallest: Mia > Leo > Sam. Sam is the shortest.

questions.question_text: How many sides does this shape have?
questions.solution: A hexagon has six sides.

questions.question_text: A pencil costs 5 coins. How many coins do 4 pencils cost?
questions.solution: 4 pencils x 5 coins = 20 coins.

questions.question_text: How many triangles can you count in the figure (including small and large ones)?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 140 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="70,10 130,120 10,120" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="70" y1="10" x2="70" y2="120" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: A large triangle divided by a line from the top vertex to the base midpoint, forming two smaller triangles.
questions.solution: There are two small triangles plus the big outer triangle, for a total of 3 triangles.

questions.question_text: Three kids line up: Ben is not first. Ana is before Ben. Carl is last. Who is first?
questions.solution: Carl is last, and Ana is before Ben, so the order is Ana, Ben, Carl. Ana is first.

questions.question_text: Which picture shows the mirror image of the letter shown (F)?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text x="10" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="32" fill="currentColor">F</text><text x="40" y="70" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">given</text><text x="80" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="currentColor">E</text><text x="80" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">A</text><text x="115" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="currentColor" transform="scale(-1,1) translate(-260,0)">F</text><text x="115" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">B</text><text x="150" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="currentColor">T</text><text x="150" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">C</text><text x="185" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="currentColor">L</text><text x="185" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">D</text><text x="220" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="currentColor">P</text><text x="220" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">E</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A letter F on the left, with five candidate reflections labeled A-E.
questions.solution: Reflecting F horizontally produces a backwards F, shown in option C.

questions.question_text: In how many different ways can you go from A to B moving only right or down along the lines of the grid?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 140 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="120" y2="20" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="20" y1="60" x2="120" y2="60" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="20" y2="60" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="70" y1="20" x2="70" y2="60" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="120" y1="20" x2="120" y2="60" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/><text x="10" y="18" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">A</text><text x="122" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="currentColor">B</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A 2 by 1 grid of rectangles with A at top-left and B at bottom-right.
questions.solution: From A to B with 2 rights and 1 down: the down move can be taken first, middle, or last, giving 3 paths.

questions.question_text: Sara has coins worth 1, 2, and 5. She uses exactly three coins to pay 8. Which combination did she use?
questions.solution: 5 + 2 + 1 = 8 using three coins.

questions.question_text: Which piece fits the missing spot in the big square?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="10" width="80" height="80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="50" y="50" width="40" height="40" fill="#ffffff" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="110" y="30" width="20" height="20" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="115" y="70" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">A</text><rect x="140" y="20" width="40" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="155" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">B</text><rect x="190" y="25" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="200" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">C</text><polygon points="230,20 260,20 245,60" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="240" y="75" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">D</text><circle cx="245" cy="95" r="10" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><text x="240" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="currentColor">E</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A big square with a smaller 40x40 square cut out; options A-E are different shapes and sizes.
questions.solution: The missing piece is 40x40 in size, matching option D.

questions.question_text: Look at the pattern: 2, 4, 6, 8, ?. What number comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 260 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text x="10" y="28" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="currentColor">2,</text><text x="50" y="28" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="currentColor">4,</text><text x="90" y="28" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="currentColor">6,</text><text x="130" y="28" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="currentColor">8,</text><text x="170" y="28" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="currentColor">?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The sequence 2, 4, 6, 8, ? written in a row.
questions.solution: The pattern adds 2 each step. After 8 comes 10.

questions.question_text: A cube has how many faces (flat sides)?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 140 140" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><polygon points="30,50 90,50 90,110 30,110" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="30,50 50,30 110,30 90,50" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="90,50 110,30 110,90 90,110" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
questions.image_description: A drawing of a cube in 3D perspective.
questions.solution: A cube has 6 faces: top, bottom, left, right, front, back.
